Download OCR via link

https://sourceforge.net/projects/tesseract-ocr.mirror/files/5.5.0/tesseract-ocr-w64-setup-5.5.0.20241111.exe/

Using new Keyword

*** Variables ***
${IMAGE_EXPECTED}      ./DB_IMG/J97.png

*** Test Cases ***

${result}  ${call_count}=      FIND_IMAGE_AND_TOUCH_IT     ${IMAGE_EXPECTED}   ${CALL_COUNT}
